symptom: stomach pain after swallowing a light bulb on a dare
hook: a whole intact light bulb was sitting inside the stomach
whatYouSee: A whole light bulb sitting inside the stomach.
whyItMatters: A swallowed glass bulb can break and cut the gut so it often needs careful removal.
treatment: It is usually removed by endoscopy or surgery before it can shatter.
takeaway: The outline of a bulb in the stomach is a swallowed light bulb.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with stomach pain after swallowing a light bulb on a dare.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a whole intact light bulb was sitting inside the stomach.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Swallowed light bulb

👀 What you see:
A whole light bulb sitting inside the stomach.

🦴 Why it matters:
A swallowed glass bulb can break and cut the gut so it often needs careful removal.

💊 Treatment:
It is usually removed by endoscopy or surgery before it can shatter.
